bundled.title: Graves Left Wanting
bundled.author: Karl Druid (art Johan Nohr)
bundled.description: The party awakens in coffins in the cursed cemetery of Graven-Tosk. There is no defined ending and no clear escape path.

bundled.title: Rotblack Sludge
bundled.author: Pelle Nilsson & Johan Nohr (Mörk Borg core book)
bundled.description: The Shadow King's heir is missing. Retrieve him discreetly from the Accursed Den. The iconic intro module.

bundled.title: Sepulchre of the Swamp Witch
bundled.author: MBC: Sepulchre of the Swamp Witch
bundled.description: A murdered messenger carried forbidden words to the Dead Root Altar — words that fulfill any wish. Get past Ueth's drug cult. Pay the price.

bundled.title: The Death Ziggurat
bundled.author: MBC: The Death Ziggurat
bundled.description: Find the ziggurat and stop the demon spawn Akünh from breaking free of her Death Realm prison. A cosmic necrocrawl.

bundled.title: The Goblin Grinder
bundled.author: MBC: The Goblin Grinder
bundled.description: Galgenbeck is overrun. The cure is fake. The alchemist is making the goblins. Storm the Derelict Mill before the price of survival rises again.

bundled.title: Devil's Tomb
bundled.author: Johan Nohr (MÖRK BORG dungeon generator)
bundled.description: Retrieve the stolen Eyes of the Icon of St Largoth from a one-page hellhole deep in Graven-Tosk. The Plant of Life waits at the back. The chained bronze door reads GO TO NECH.

bundled.title: Bloat
bundled.author: MBC: Bloat
bundled.description: A gluttonous underground labyrinth where Silas the Fattened King consumes the world one body at a time. Six rooms of fat, filth, and ravenous magic.

bundled.title: Eat Prey Kill
bundled.author: Karl Druid (MBC: Eat Prey Kill)
bundled.description: Regional bestiary + hunting rules. Roll for Presence, hunt for meat, suffer the d10 mishap. Not a scenario — a supplement to keep on hand at the table.

bundled.title: The Tenebrous Reliquary
bundled.author: Various (MBC: Tenebrous Reliquary)
bundled.description: Thirty-six accursed objects. A d66 cursed-item table the GM places, and the players regret.

bundled.title: Smoke in the Reed Fields
bundled.author: Trevor Burkholder
bundled.description: A Ronin Borg one-shot. Three rōnin wake at a burning village. A dishonored lord waits in the watchtower. Something older than all of them watches from the mountain.
